headline: Will California’s toilet paper warehouse fire impact Washington DC?
summary: A fire destroyed a Kimberly-Clark toilet paper warehouse in California. There could be supply issues, but will Washington DC consumers be impacted?

headline: Kotex displays art inspired by menstruation to confront taboos
summary: The mobile-heavy campaign strategically places QR codes near major museums to draw attention to a virtual gallery.

headline: Kimberly-Clark (KMB) Target Trimmed by Wells Fargo on Inflation-Driven Margin Outlook
summary: Kimberly-Clark Corporation (NASDAQ:KMB) is included among the 15 Blue Chip Stocks with Highest Dividends. On April 8, Wells Fargo lowered its price recommendation on Kimberly-Clark Corporation (NASDAQ:KMB) to $100 from $110. It reiterated an Equal Weight rating on the shares. The firm is cutting estimates across the sector ahead of quarterly results. It based those […]
